instruction: Six icons in a 3×2 grid (shopping-cart, gift, tag, truck, key, lock-closed). Bolden ONLY the truck to stroke-width 3. The other five must remain at the default 1.5.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 256 128" width="256" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="256" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="shopping-cart" data-source="heroicons/outline/shopping-cart.svg" transform="translate(16, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M2.25 3h1.386c.51 0 .955.343 1.087.835l.383 1.437M7.5 14.25a3 3 0 0 0-3 3h15.75m-12.75-3h11.218c1.121-2.3 2.1-4.684 2.924-7.138a60.114 60.114 0 0 0-16.536-1.84M7.5 14.25 5.106 5.272M6 20.25a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0Zm12.75 0a.75.75 0 1 1-1.5 0 .75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0Z"/></g>
  <g id="gift" data-source="heroicons/outline/gift.svg" transform="translate(96, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M20.625 11.505v8.25a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5H4.875a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5-1.5v-8.25m8.25-6.375A2.625 2.625 0 1 0 9 7.755h2.625m0-2.625v2.625m0-2.625a2.625 2.625 0 1 1 2.625 2.625h-2.625m0 0v13.5M3 11.505h18c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125v-1.5c0-.622-.504-1.125-1.125-1.125H3c-.621 0-1.125.503-1.125 1.125v1.5c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125Z"/></g>
  <g id="tag" data-source="heroicons/outline/tag.svg" transform="translate(176, 16) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M9.568 3H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3 5.25v4.318c0 .597.237 1.17.659 1.591l9.581 9.581c.699.699 1.78.872 2.607.33a18.095 18.095 0 0 0 5.223-5.223c.542-.827.369-1.908-.33-2.607L11.16 3.66A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 9.568 3Z"/>
  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 6h.008v.008H6V6Z"/></g>
  <g id="truck" data-source="heroicons/outline/truck.svg" transform="translate(16, 72) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M8.25 18.75a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-3 0m3 0a1.5 1.5 0 0 0-3 0m3 0h6m-9 0H3.375a1.125 1.125 0 0 1-1.125-1.125V14.25m17.25 4.5a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-3 0m3 0a1.5 1.5 0 0 0-3 0m3 0h1.125c.621 0 1.129-.504 1.09-1.124a17.902 17.902 0 0 0-3.213-9.193 2.056 2.056 0 0 0-1.58-.86H14.25M16.5 18.75h-2.25m0-11.177v-.958c0-.568-.422-1.048-.987-1.106a48.554 48.554 0 0 0-10.026 0 1.106 1.106 0 0 0-.987 1.106v7.635m12-6.677v6.677m0 4.5v-4.5m0 0h-12"/></g>
  <g id="key" data-source="heroicons/outline/key.svg" transform="translate(96, 72) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.75 5.25a3 3 0 0 1 3 3m3 0a6 6 0 0 1-7.029 5.912c-.563-.097-1.159.026-1.563.43L10.5 17.25H8.25v2.25H6v2.25H2.25v-2.818c0-.597.237-1.17.659-1.591l6.499-6.499c.404-.404.527-1 .43-1.563A6 6 0 1 1 21.75 8.25Z"/></g>
  <g id="lock-closed" data-source="heroicons/outline/lock-closed.svg" transform="translate(176, 72) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.5 10.5V6.75a4.5 4.5 0 1 0-9 0v3.75m-.75 11.25h10.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25v-6.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H6.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25 2.25v6.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:

  <g id="lock-closed" data-source="heroicons/outline/lock-closed.svg" transform="translate(176, 72) scale(2)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16.5 10.5V6.75a4.5 4.5 0 1 0-9 0v3.75m-.75 11.25h10.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25v-6.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H6.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25 2.25v6.75a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25Z"/></g>
